subject: [PATCH v1 1/2] fuse: fix missing barrier when checking io-uring readiness

2026-07-13.patch_summary: This patch fixes a potential issue in the FUSE (Filesystem in Userspace) kernel module where a CPU might observe that io-uring initialization is complete before it actually is, leading to skipped checks and incorrect behavior. The fix involves adding a read barrier to pair with an existing write barrier, ensuring that the two loads are properly ordered. This patch addresses a problem introduced by a previous commit (3393ff964e0f) and is intended to prevent issues related to io-uring initialization.
